Home Assistant Smart System

A home automation system built around Jetson Nano, ESP32 and Alexa, with a custom smart artwork node combining environmental sensing and visual interaction.

Project Overview

This project combines home automation, embedded electronics and visual design into one connected system. A Jetson Nano runs Home Assistant as the main server, while ESP32 boards manage sensors, LEDs and local interaction. Alexa and smart plugs are integrated into the same automation flow.

System Architecture

The Jetson Nano acts as the Home Assistant server, connected through the router to Alexa, ESP32 nodes and smart plugs. This structure allows centralized automation with distributed physical devices.

Smart Artwork Node

One of the key parts of the project is a custom artwork-like object built around a broken motherboard. The motherboard was reused as a visual element, while an ESP32 controls colored LEDs and reads a DHT11 humidity sensor. A custom 3D-printed frame hides the electronics and gives the object a finished appearance.
